scenario: Beta-reading coordinator fan-out with one reader blocking
description: Tests parallel dispatch of beta readers. Genre-lens (2 readers) and craft-lens (3 readers) are dispatched simultaneously. One craft-lens reader (sensitivity) blocks. Validates that: genre-lens completes independently, craft-lens propagates blocked, beta-reading-coordinator propagates blocked, and beta-synthesizer is NOT dispatched.
preconditions: Chapter 1 revised and ready for beta reading
